title: Incorrect result from LEFT JOIN with OR in the WHERE clause
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with OR in WHERE clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, age INTEGER, email TEXT UNIQUE);
CREATE TABLE comments (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, content TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
INSERT INTO users (name, age, email) VALUES ('Alice', 30, 'alice@example.com');
INSERT INTO users (name, age, email) VALUES ('Bob', NULL, 'bob@example.com');
SELECT u.name, c.content FROM users u LEFT JOIN comments c ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE u.age > 25 OR c.content IS NULL;
